content: Microsoft Presidio is the de facto on-prem OSS PII detection standard: MIT, active (2.2.362 March 2026, June 2026 recognizer packs), deployable as self-hosted Docker REST services (analyzer/anonymizer). GLiNER integrates as a Presidio recognizer for better NER (GPU optional). Java integration = call the analyzer HTTP API from the worker. Cloud DLP (Google DLP, Macie, Azure) excluded for on-prem.
